name: cloudnsofts-project-tracking
description: Project tracking app — Next.js frontend + Node.js backend with end-to-end type safety

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cnsofts/shared && npm run build -w @cnsofts/backend && npm run build -w @cnsofts/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present

comment:overrides: Force one React across the workspace — @hugeicons/react pulls React 18, which npm hoisted to root and Next 15 then resolved instead of the frontend's React 19, breaking the production build (react element $$typeof mismatch → React #31).
